audit_items.proof_trace: All five ber_strdup() results (mech/realm/authcid/authzid/secprops) are used exclusively through NULL-safe paths: vc_sasl_mech is only accessed via boolean guards or inside an `if (vc_sasl_mech)` block; realm/authcid are passed to lutil_sasl_defaults() which handles NULL gracefully (sasl.c:80-84); vc_sasl_authzid and vc_sasl_secprops are never referenced downstream after assignment. OOM causes silent authentication fallback, not a dereference crash.
